summary: Iteration 4: PRO features testing - Backend 100% pass (15/15 tests). New /api/crypto/accuracy endpoint verified, scheduler jobs confirmed (accuracy_tracker, london_market_email, nyse_market_email). Fixed datetime timezone comparison bug in /api/user/subscription endpoint. All previous features (signals, history, watchlist, AI chat) still working.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All PRO features working. New /api/crypto/accuracy endpoint returns stats for 1h/4h/24h with pump/dump/overall/samples fields. Scheduler has 4 jobs configured: crypto_signals (hourly), accuracy_tracker (hourly), london_market_email (08:00 UTC), nyse_market_email (14:30 UTC). AccuracyTracker component added to SignalsDashboard at line 334. Fixed timezone bug in subscription endpoint. Frontend testing skipped due to Cloudflare rate limiting.
